raw_text:
ACCOUNTANT

SUMMARY
Staff accountant with 4 years in general ledger and reporting.

EXPERIENCE
Staff Accountant, Acme Corp
- Managed accounts payable and accounts receivable across two entities
- Prepared monthly financial reporting and reconciliations in Excel
- Prepared corporate tax returns and supported the annual audit

EDUCATION
BSc in Accounting

SENIOR ACCOUNTANT

EXPERIENCE
Senior Accountant, Globex
- Owned GAAP financial reporting and month-end close
- Built reconciliations and variance analysis in Excel
- Reviewed accounts payable and tax filings

EDUCATION
Bachelor's degree, Accounting

SOFTWARE DEVELOPER

EXPERIENCE
Software Engineer, TechCo
- Built backend services in Python and SQL
- Deployed containers on AWS with Docker
- Developed React front-ends in JavaScript

EDUCATION
BSc in Computer Science

DATA ENGINEER

EXPERIENCE
Data Engineer, DataWorks
- Built ETL pipelines in Python and SQL
- Ran workloads on AWS
- Containerized jobs with Docker

EDUCATION
BSc Computer Science

CHEF

EXPERIENCE
Sous Chef, The Bistro
- Ran the line in a high-volume professional kitchen
- Planned menus and enforced food safety standards
- Managed and trained line cooks

EDUCATION
Culinary Arts Diploma

REGISTERED NURSE

EXPERIENCE
Registered Nurse, City Hospital
- Delivered patient care on a 30-bed ward
- Administered medication and maintained medical records
- Supported physicians with clinical procedures

EDUCATION
BSc Nursing
